stemHtml: Concerning turbine engines, a distorted inlet airflow (i.e. due to heavy in-flight turbulence) can cause (1) _____ in the air inlet, which could lead to (2) _____ within the compressor section.

options.a: (1) an airflow separation; (2) abrupt compressor RPM droppage.
options.b: (1) inlet icing; (2) abrupt compressor RPM droppage.
